# RelahConvert

> Free browser-based image tools. No upload, no server, no account needed. All processing happens locally in your browser.

## What is RelahConvert?

RelahConvert is a free online image converter and editor. Every tool runs entirely in the browser — files never leave your device. No signup, no ads, no limits.

## Tools Available

- Compress Image — reduce JPG, PNG, WebP file size without quality loss
- Resize Image — change image dimensions in pixels or percentage
- Crop Image — crop any image to custom dimensions
- Convert JPG to PNG — lossless format conversion
- Convert PNG to JPG — compress PNG to smaller JPG
- Convert JPG to WebP — modern format for faster websites
- Convert WebP to JPG — convert WebP back to universal JPG
- Remove Background — AI-powered background removal in browser
- Blur Background — blur image background instantly
- Add Watermark — add text or logo watermark to images
- Rotate Image — rotate or flip images
- Convert to PDF — turn images into PDF documents
- Passport Photo Maker — create passport photos for 160+ countries
- Image Splitter — split images into grid pieces
- Sharpen Image — enhance image sharpness
- Pixelate Image — pixelate faces or areas
- Add Text to Image — overlay text on images
- Enlarge Image — upscale images with AI
- And 20+ more free tools

## Supported Languages

English, French, Spanish, Portuguese, German, Arabic, Italian, Dutch, Russian, Japanese, Chinese, Korean, Hindi, Turkish, Polish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese, Thai, Indonesian, Malay, Romanian, Czech, Swedish, Norwegian, Danish

## Key Facts

- 100% free, no account required
- Browser-only processing — complete privacy
- Supports JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, SVG, ICO formats
- Works on desktop and mobile
- Available at https://relahconvert.com
